So, Eliane, tell me about this clinic. What is the big vision?
We are building a state-of-the-art fertility clinic in São Paulo. The plan is to be fully operational by 2027.
Ambitious. What is your timeline for getting there?
Right now we are on track. Our first milestone, the lease, is already signed, and the rollout starts next spring.
And how are you going to fund the capital investment?
We have closed our seed funding, and I am meeting two more investors next month.
Who is your target patient?
Women over 35 who want cutting-edge care. And genetic testing is a natural adjacent market for us.
I like it. This model sounds scalable. Let us schedule a longer call.
The plan is to be fully operational by 2027.
We are on track to open next year.
One of our main priorities is patient safety.
What sets this apart is our cutting-edge technology.

Hi, I'm Daniel, and I founded a medical-device company three years ago. Let me walk you through our launch timeline. Right now, we are finishing the design of our new lab equipment. Next quarter, we are going to start production, and we are opening our first facility in Austin in the fall. Our seed funding is already in place, so we plan to be fully operational by early next year. I won't pretend it is easy, but the market is growing fast, and I believe demand will double within five years. My advice? Set clear milestones, protect your timeline, and keep every stakeholder informed. If you stay on track, the hard work pays off.

Hi Eliane, this is Rachel from the equipment team in Boston. I am calling about the timeline for your new facility. Good news: your state-of-the-art incubators are ready, and we are shipping them next week. Installation is going to take about ten days, so you will be operational sooner than we expected. I am also sending a quote for the second phase of your rollout. One of our main priorities is keeping you on track, so please call me if anything changes. We are really excited to be part of this venture. Talk soon, and congratulations on the progress.
